commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a98a3804c00768c59ad73a1c6d2d1c6f4e339a75)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes AntigravityModelQuota.remainingPercent to treat a missing remainingFraction as 100% remaining instead of 0% remaining.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main maps nil Antigravity remainingFraction to 0% remaining, then automatic summary mode picks the highest usedPercent across family lanes. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the contributor must update stale tests and provide real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's runtime proof.

target.title: Fix Antigravity summary bar ignoring Gemini family quota by masking it with untracked Claude quota
target.body:
Resolves #1334. 

In Antigravity Status Probe, an untracked model quota without a `remainingFraction` was defaulting to `0` for `remainingPercent`, thereby yielding `100` for `usedPercent`. When automatic summary mode picks the most constrained window across primary/secondary/tertiary lanes, an untracked Claude quota (yielding 100% used) could incorrectly mask an actually exhausted Gemini quota, causing the summary bar to perpetually show 100%. 

This PR defaults `remainingPercent` to `100` for `nil` remaining fractions to prevent them from surfacing as exhausted quota.
target.author: martin-hausleitner

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
